metadata.task: Measure the oscillator mass displacement from the spring reference position and report the oscillation amplitude as a single number rounded to the nearest tenth.
metadata.description: The amplitude is the maximum offset of the mass from the spring reference position at the start of the trial. Query or observe the scene state to measure that offset, then return only the numeric amplitude.

expected_behavior: The LLM measures the mass offset from the spring reference position and reports the numeric amplitude.
reasoning: The measured initial offset from the spring reference position is 0.2, so the amplitude is 0.2.
